frontmatter.title: WP Admin proxy for NGINX
frontmatter.description: How to proxy wp-admin in a headless wordpress setup.

frontmatter.title: Apple - Security for travellers sucks
frontmatter.description: Did you know that you can't print any recovery code for your AppleID account? The more you protect it, the more is likely you loose control over it. And do you travel a lot? Then you'd better read this!
